name: ecommerce
app_description: A simulated online storefront where shoppers browse products, manage carts, apply promotions, and complete checkout.
key_user_flows: browse product catalog and filter results
add items to cart and edit quantities
apply a promotion or shipping option
complete checkout with a mock payment method
test_priorities: verify pricing and totals before confirmation
exercise mobile-width cart and checkout flows
constraints: use simulated products, users, carts, and payments only
do not assume access to real payment processors
prefer deterministic assertions over generated copy
